scripts.build:frontend: npm -w frontend ci && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.synth: npm run build:frontend && cd infra && cdk synth
scripts.deploy: npm run build:frontend && cd infra && cdk deploy
scripts.deploy:fast: npm run build:frontend && aws s3 sync frontend/dist s3://transcripcion-con-resumen-frontend-376129873205-us-east-1 --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E3JIWBABET2DXX --paths "/*"
